title: Save Record
description: Closed shape for an exportable save record. Pinned by `pack-trust.md` Â§ Save Version Bounds. Imports validate against this schema BEFORE any pack mount, asset fetch, or IndexedDB write â€” see `docs/architecture/wiki/screens/70-save-import/`. The runtime contract is owned by `tasks/mvp/08-persistence/10-save-schema-and-validator.md`.

saveVersion.description: Monotonic save-format revision counter. Imports compare to runtimeMin/Max bounds; out-of-range values terminate without a click-through path.

minRuntimeSaveVersion.description: Minimum runtime save-format the file expects. If runtime > max, importer surfaces ui.save-import.reject.too-new.

maxRuntimeSaveVersion.description: Maximum runtime save-format the file expects. Used to gate forward-version refusal.

engineHash.description: 16-hex-char xxh64 digest of the engine build that authored the save. Pinned by saves/replays/multiplayer per `engine-hash.md`.

rulesetId.description: Stable ruleset id referenced by the save.

seed.description: PCG32 seed serialized as a decimal string to avoid Number-precision drift across JS engines.

packHashes.description: Per-referenced-pack identity record. Mismatch on a `required: true` entry surfaces compatibility=skew (warn, gateable). Used by screens 70 and 72 for disclosure.

commandLog.description: Sequence of canonical commands replayed against rulesetId at seed.

stateHash.description: 16-hex-char xxh64 digest of the canonical-JSON serialization of GameState after replay completes. Mismatch surfaces compatibility=tamper (terminal, no continue).

displayNameMode.description: Per `data-inventory.md`: when `hashed`, `playerHash` + `playerLabel` are written and `playerName` is omitted. Default flips to `hashed` for new installs.

playerName.description: Cleartext display name. Only present when `displayNameMode = clear` (opt-in via screen 56 Privacy pane).

playerHash.description: Salted xxh64 of the display name. Hash boundary: `xxh64(displayName + localSalt)`. The salt lives in IndexedDB `hr-profile.keys` and is wiped by `WIPE_LOCAL_DATA scope=profile|all`.

playerLabel.description: Player-chosen short opaque label rendered in lieu of cleartext name (e.g. "Suna" â†’ "S.").
